_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin haploinsufficiency results in altered spermatogenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: The number of Leydig cells present in Nf1+/- mice was significantly lower than in Nf1 control littermates (p = 0.02)
details: Number of Leydig cells significantly reduced in Nf1+/- mice (24.2 ± 1.2) compared to controls (28.2 ± 0.71), p = 0.02
